rag_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting AGREE annex blocks in valid component type or implementation scopes
Place component type contracts in component type annexes and implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
Use only visible identifiers in AGREE expressions; avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
generic_rules: Maintain consistent scope alignment between AADL architecture and AGREE contracts
Use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations and expressions
Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions; expose properties through ports or constants when needed
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks use `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax
Use `eq` for equations and `const` for constants in AGREE annexes
Use `assign` for implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not use AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions without proper exposure
